name: DNSimple
description: DNSimple provides domain registration, DNS hosting, and SSL certificate management with a developer-friendly API.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to DNSimple at https://dnsimple.com
2. Go to Account > Access Tokens
3. Create a new account token or user token
4. Copy the token value
5. Find your Account ID in Account settings
6. Enter both values above

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 or account token from your DNSimple account settings.

credentialFields.label: Account ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your DNSimple account ID (numeric). Find it at Settings > Account.

checks.name: TLS / HTTPS
checks.description: Checks SSL/TLS certificates managed in DNSimple for expiration and validity status.

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Checks DNSSEC status for domains managed in DNSimple to ensure DNS query integrity.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Checks domain registration status and expiration dates to ensure continuity of service.
